sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_signbit (value DOUBLE, signbit_result BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO test_signbit VALUES (-1.0, signbit(-1.0)), (1.0, signbit(1.0)), (0.0, signbit(0.0));
UPDATE test_signbit SET signbit_result = signbit(value) WHERE value < 0.0;
SELECT value, signbit_result FROM test_signbit WHERE signbit_result = TRUE;
DELETE FROM test_signbit WHERE signbit_result = FALSE;
